title: Sabarmati–Ajmer Intercity Express
summary:
The 19411 / 19412 Sabarmati–Ajmer Intercity Express is an intercity express  train belonging to Indian Railways Western Railway zone that runs between Sabarmati in (Ahmedabad) and Ajmer Junction in India.
It operates as train number 19411 from Sabarmati to Ajmer Junction and as train number 19412 in the reverse direction serving the states of Gujarat and Rajasthan.
text:
The 19411 / 19412 Sabarmati–Ajmer Intercity Express is an intercity express  train belonging to Indian Railways Western Railway zone that runs between Sabarmati in (Ahmedabad) and Ajmer Junction in India.
It operates as train number 19411 from Sabarmati to Ajmer Junction and as train number 19412 in the reverse direction serving the states of Gujarat and Rajasthan.

Coaches
The Sabarmati–Ajmer Intercity Express has one AC chair car, 11 general unreserved and two SLR (seating with luggage rake) coaches. It does not carry a pantry car coach.
